name: Ginger-Cranberry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Jellied cranberry sauce (cut into cubes)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart saucepan, combine the cubed cranberry sauce, dressing, soy sauce, ground ginger, garlic powder, and cayenne pepper.
2. Heat over medium heat until the cranberry sauce is melted, stirring often.
3. Remove from heat and pour into a bowl to cool to room temperature.
4. Use the sauce to glaze ham during the last 30 minutes of heating or serve as a sauce for cooked ham, pork, or poultry.
5. Refrigerate any remaining sauce. Makes about 1 1/2 cups sauce.
